title: Embedded Components onramp
excerpt: Learn about the Embedded Components onramp. Build an onramp flow native to your app or website with components that provide authentication and secure data collection, tailored to your design. [Get started](https://docs.stripe.com/crypto/onramp/embedded-components-integration-guide.md) 1. A customer visits your app or website and wants to convert fiat to crypto or purchase crypto. 1. Your app prompts them to onboard by signing up or logging in to [Link](https://docs.stripe.com/payments/link.md). 1. They sign up or log into Link without leaving your app or website.
